servinfo.title: Passenger Air Bag Deactivation Indicator Inspection

ptxt.intxrefpoff: Passenger Air Bag Deactivation Indicator Removal and Installation

s1.ptxt: Remove passenger air bag deactivation indicator.
Connect battery to the passenger air bag deactivation indicator as shown.
Check that passenger air bag deactivation indicator (1) lights up.
If passenger air bag deactivation indicator (1) does not light up, replace the hazard warning switch.
